name: linResetNAD
title: linResetNAD
description: This function resets NAD (Node Address for Diagnostic) of the Slave node determined by the CAPL program context to its initial NAD.
See Option .LIN: Notes to the way initial NAD is determined to understand how initial NAD is determined in CANoe.
If the CAPL program calling this function, does not model a LIN 2.x Slave node, then this function will have no effect.
return: On success this function returns a value unequal to -1, otherwise -1.
